task.title: Make CodeWiki UI value-first with retro Kanban Board
task.summary: Update the local browser CodeWiki UI so Product defaults to stories/UI surfaces, the right source drawer leads with alignment/evidence/next actions, and Board renders roadmap work as a retro terminal Kanban board.

goal.outcome: The browser CodeWiki UI presents less backend noise and makes Product, Board, and selected-detail drawer content useful to users by default.
acceptance: Product landing displays User Stories and UI Surfaces before users/personas, with source detail disclosed contextually.
Right drawer content for Status/Product/System/Board/Graph leads with purpose, alignment/evidence, warnings or gates, and next safe action; raw source paths/payloads are collapsed by default.
Board renders roadmap work in retro terminal Kanban lanes derived from roadmap truth, without hidden UI-only state.
UI remains local-first and source-backed; raw canonical details remain accessible when explicitly expanded.
non_goals: No changes to Pi TUI beyond existing launch/status surfaces.
verification: Run npm run typecheck or explain blocking unrelated dirty-worktree errors.
Inspect served /assets/control-room.js and /assets/control-room.css for Product, Board, drawer, and retro Kanban strings.

exit_criteria: Fresh task-close validation in clean worktree before closure.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation/task-close validation requires fresh_context=true, clean=true, and checked SHA evidence.
evidence: Current worktree has pre-existing unrelated TASK-074 dirty files; closure validation must run after isolation/clean state.
validation.handoff: Validate TASK-075 from artifacts in a clean worktree before closing.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

summary: Implemented TASK-075 UI changes: Product progressive disclosure, value-first right source drawer content, and retro terminal Kanban Board.

evidence: Existing control-room smoke test exercises product/board models and served JS/CSS assets.
Added smoke assertions for .kanban, .source-drawer, Retro Kanban copy, Stories/UI copy, and Source Markdown drawer copy.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Updated web UI rendering and client helpers only in extensions/codewiki/src/adapters/web/control-room.ts.
notes: Pre-existing dirty worktree and active TASK-074 claim exist; changes were kept to TASK-075 docs, web UI, smoke test, builds, and roadmap task.
Task closure not performed because fresh clean-worktree validation gate is not currently satisfiable in this shared dirty worktree.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Existing control-room smoke test exercises product/board models and served JS/CSS assets.
Added smoke assertions for .kanban, .source-drawer, Retro Kanban copy, Stories/UI copy, and Source Markdown drawer copy.
code_change_evidence: Updated web UI rendering and client helpers only in extensions/codewiki/src/adapters/web/control-room.ts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Product landing displays User Stories and UI Surfaces before users/personas, with source detail disclosed contextually.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: renderProduct now renders only stories and UI categories in the workspace, while audience/user context appears as a count and selected-drawer context.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Right drawer content for Status/Product/System/Board/Graph leads with purpose, alignment/evidence, warnings or gates, and next safe action; raw source paths/payloads are collapsed by default.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Inspector functions now render value-first signal blocks and collapsed details.source-drawer for source Markdown, graph records, task criteria, and source anchors.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Board renders roadmap work in retro terminal Kanban lanes derived from roadmap truth, without hidden UI-only state.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: renderBoard now builds Now/Ready/Blocked/Verify lanes from task status/phase/order and CSS adds retro terminal Kanban styling.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: UI remains local-first and source-backed; raw canonical details remain accessible when explicitly expanded.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: No server/API ownership changed; source details remain in collapsed source drawer sections.

risks: Need fresh validation/closure once TASK-074 dirty work and active claim are resolved or this change is reviewed in an isolated clean worktree.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-075 Make CodeWiki UI value-first with retro Kanban Board implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-075 UI changes: Product progressive disclosure, value-first right source drawer content, and retro terminal Kanban Board.

Checks: node tests/smoke/control-room.test.mjs: pass, npm run typecheck: pass, npm run test:smoke: pass
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.

closure_brief.user_intent: Make the local CodeWiki UI value-first through progressive Product disclosure, source drawers that lead with alignment/evidence, and a retro terminal Kanban Board.
implemented_changes: Updated Product view ordering and disclosure to emphasize stories and UI surfaces.
Updated right drawer content to lead with purpose, alignment/evidence, warnings, and next action.
Rendered roadmap Board as a retro terminal Kanban view.
acceptance_evidence: Implementation build records UI acceptance and smoke evidence.
remaining_risks: Historical build paths predate root src/ restructure and are retained as archival evidence.
